page_metadata.biotools__summary: Workflow tool useful for core facilities to create pipelines that run on PBS or SGE clusters or on GRIDS. It ships with pipelines for alignment and SNP/SV calling of Illumina next generation data and with pipelines for GWAS imputation using impute2, minimach or beagle.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Workflow tool useful for core facilities to create pipelines that run on PBS or SGE clusters or on GRIDS. It ships with pipelines for alignment and SNP/SV calling of Illumina next generation data and with pipelines for GWAS imputation using impute2, minimach or beagle.
